title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Delhivery Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Delhivery Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Distribution Manager looking for your next big career move? Delhivery Digital Technologies in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Delhivery Digital Technologies:
Delhivery Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Digital Technologies!
